metadata.description: Fix all bare \cite{} commands in the arxiv/main.tex file, converting them to proper natbib commands (\citet, \citep, \citeauthor, \citeyearpar)

summary: Fixed all natbib citation commands in arxiv/main.tex. Converted 37 bare \cite{} commands to proper natbib forms: 16 \citet (author names that were manually typed before \cite), 19 \citep (parenthetical references), 1 \citeauthor + 1 \citeyearpar (possessive case for Entman's). Product/concept names (DeepDream, DALL-E, GANs, etc.) were preserved with \citep. Zero bare \cite{} remain in the file.

decision.description: Fix all bare \cite{} commands in arxiv/main.tex by converting them to proper natbib commands (\citet, \citep, \citeauthor, \citeyearpar) using the already-fixed NHB2026/sections/ files as reference patterns
decision.rationale: The arxiv/main.tex file contains the same text as the NHB2026/sections/ files but flattened. The sections files have already been fixed with proper natbib commands. Each bare \cite{} will be converted based on context: author names before \cite -> \citet; parenthetical references -> \citep; possessives -> \citeauthor + \citeyearpar; product names before \cite -> keep name + \citep.
decision.revision_note: All 37 bare \cite{} commands converted: 16 to \citet, 19 to \citep, 1 to \citeauthor, 1 to \citeyearpar. Zero bare \cite{} remain.

contribution.description: Fixed natbib citation commands in arxiv/main.tex using NHB2026 patterns as reference
